title: Present Perfect или Past Simple
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete the sentences and briefly explain each choice: 1) I ___ (lose) my keys, so I can't open the door. 2) We ___ (visit) Prague in 2023. 3) ___ you ever ___ (try) scuba diving? 4) She ___ (not finish) the report yet.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) have lost; 2) visited; 3) Have, tried; 4) hasn't finished.
criteria: Present Perfect for a present result, life experience and yet
Past Simple for a finished time in 2023
common_errors: using Present Perfect with a finished date

title: First и Second Conditional
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete and classify the conditionals: 1) If the weather ___ (improve), we ___ (go) hiking tomorrow. 2) If I ___ (be) the team leader, I ___ (change) the schedule. 3) What would you do if you ___ (miss) an important deadline?

rubric.reference_answer: 1) improves, will go — First Conditional; 2) were, would change — Second Conditional; 3) missed.
criteria: present form after if in First Conditional
past form and would in Second Conditional
distinguishes realistic future from hypothetical present/future

title: Active to Passive
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Rewrite in the passive without changing the tense: 1) Researchers developed the vaccine in 2020. 2) The company is testing a new payment system. 3) Someone has stolen my bicycle. 4) They will announce the results tomorrow.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The vaccine was developed in 2020. 2) A new payment system is being tested. 3) My bicycle has been stolen. 4) The results will be announced tomorrow.
common_errors: using past simple in every sentence

title: Reported Speech
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Report the statements as if you were speaking the next day: 1) Maya said, ‘I am working from home today.’ 2) Leo said, ‘I finished the task yesterday.’ 3) Nina asked, ‘Have you seen this document?’
starter_code:
1) Maya said that ...
2) Leo said that ...
3) Nina asked ...

rubric.reference_answer: 1) Maya said that she was working from home that day. 2) Leo said that he had finished the task the day before. 3) Nina asked whether/if I had seen that document.
criteria: backshift after a past reporting verb
reported yes/no question uses if or whether and statement order

title: Must, might или can’t
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Choose must, might/could or can't and explain the evidence: 1) The lights are off and nobody answers; they ___ be at home. 2) Her car is outside; she ___ be in the office. 3) I am not sure, but the email ___ be in the spam folder. 4) He knew the confidential details; someone ___ have told him.

criteria: modal + have + past participle for past deduction
common_errors: must told instead of must have told

title: Relative Clauses
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Combine the sentences with a relative clause and add commas where needed: 1) The woman designed the app. She won an award. 2) My laptop is five years old. It still works perfectly. 3) The café serves vegan food. We met there.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) The woman who designed the app won an award. 2) My laptop, which is five years old, still works perfectly. 3) The café where we met serves vegan food.

title: Gerund или Infinitive
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Complete the sentences and explain the difference in meaning where relevant: 1) I remember ___ (meet) her before. 2) Remember ___ (send) the invoice. 3) He stopped ___ (smoke) last year. 4) He stopped ___ (buy) some water.

rubric.reference_answer: 1) meeting; 2) to send; 3) smoking; 4) to buy.
criteria: remember doing refers to a memory
remember to do refers to a future duty
stop to do means pause another action for a purpose
common_errors: treating gerund and infinitive as interchangeable

title: Articles in Context
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Insert a/an, the or — and explain two choices: ‘Last summer I took ___ train to ___ Netherlands. ___ journey took six hours. I spent most of my time looking at ___ beautiful countryside. ___ travel can teach us a lot about other cultures.’

rubric.reference_answer: a train; the Netherlands; The journey; the beautiful countryside; — travel.
criteria: a for first mention of a singular countable noun
the for a specific previously established journey/countryside
zero article for travel in general
common_errors: the travel for a general concept

title: Связный аргумент B2
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Write 90–120 words: ‘Should university attendance be optional?’ Use at least four different linking devices for contrast, reason, result and conclusion. Underline or list the linkers after the paragraph.

rubric.reference_answer: Any coherent 90–120 word argument that uses accurate B2 linkers such as however/although, because/since, therefore/as a result, and in conclusion/overall.
criteria: at least four accurate linkers with different functions

title: Formal Email to a Course Coordinator
subject: Английский язык · B2
instructions: Write a 120–150 word email to a course coordinator. You missed a presentation because of illness. Explain the situation, ask for an alternative date and offer evidence. Use an appropriate subject line, greeting and closing.

rubric.reference_answer: A polite formal email with a clear subject, reason for absence, specific request for another date, offer of a medical certificate, and an appropriate closing.
